category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the Brazil market.

title.en: China-to-Brazil LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入巴西：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入巴西：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Brazil's INMETRO compulsory conformity assessment under Portaria INMETRO 389/2021, ABNT NBR IEC 60598 / 62560 safety standards, ANATEL homologation for wireless functions, and PBE/Selo PROCEL energy labelling versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与巴西 INMETRO 强制合格评定（Portaria INMETRO 389/2021）、ABNT NBR IEC 60598 / 62560 安全标准、ANATEL 无线功能型号核准及 PBE/Selo PROCEL 能效标签要求差距对照，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與巴西 INMETRO 強制合格評定（Portaria INMETRO 389/2021）、ABNT NBR IEC 60598 / 62560 安全標準、ANATEL 無線功能型號核准及 PBE/Selo PROCEL 能效標籤要求差距對照，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INMETRO/OCP assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Brazilian law, INMETRO Portarias, ABNT NBR standards, PBE/PROCEL energy requirements, ANATEL homologation obligations, and importer/representative (CNPJ) requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INMETRO/OCP 评审、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行巴西法律、INMETRO Portarias 法令、ABNT NBR 标准、PBE/PROCEL 能效要求、ANATEL 型号核准义务及进口商/代表（CNPJ）要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INMETRO/OCP 評審、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴西法律、INMETRO Portarias 法令、ABNT NBR 標準、PBE/PROCEL 能效要求、ANATEL 型號核准義務及進口商/代表（CNPJ）要求。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer entering the Brazil market must obtain INMETRO compulsory certification through an accredited certification body (OCP) under Portaria INMETRO 389/2021, with testing to ABNT NBR IEC 60598-1 (luminaires) and ABNT NBR IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps); design products for the 127/220 V, 60 Hz grid rather than China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz; register the product and obtain the INMETRO registration number and compliance seal; meet PBE/Selo PROCEL energy labelling administered by INMETRO and Eletrobras; obtain ANATEL homologation for any luminaire with wireless functionality; and appoint an in-country importer or representative holding a Brazilian CNPJ to act before INMETRO — none of which is covered by existing Chinese CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 进入巴西市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：依据 Portaria INMETRO 389/2021，通过经认可的认证机构（OCP）取得 INMETRO 强制认证，并按 ABNT NBR IEC 60598-1（灯具）及 ABNT NBR IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯）检测；按巴西 127/220 V、60 Hz 电网而非中国 220/380 V、50 Hz 设计产品；完成产品注册并取得 INMETRO 注册号及合规标识；满足由 INMETRO 与 Eletrobras 管理的 PBE/Selo PROCEL 能效标签要求；对任何带无线功能的灯具取得 ANATEL 型号核准；并指定持有巴西 CNPJ 的在地进口商或代表在 INMETRO 面前代为办理——上述均不被现有中国 CCC 认证所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 進入巴西市場的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：依據 Portaria INMETRO 389/2021，通過經認可的認證機構（OCP）取得 INMETRO 強制認證，並按 ABNT NBR IEC 60598-1（燈具）及 ABNT NBR IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈）檢測；按巴西 127/220 V、60 Hz 電網而非中國 220/380 V、50 Hz 設計產品；完成產品注冊並取得 INMETRO 注冊號及合規標識；滿足由 INMETRO 與 Eletrobras 管理的 PBE/Selo PROCEL 能效標籤要求；對任何帶無線功能的燈具取得 ANATEL 型號核准；並指定持有巴西 CNPJ 的在地進口商或代表在 INMETRO 面前代為辦理——上述均不被現有中國 CCC 認證所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Brazilian regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred (INMETRO, ABNT, ANATEL, PROCEL/Eletrobras, Diário Oficial da União). Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 scope, ABNT NBR standard editions, and PBE/PROCEL energy thresholds must be re-verified against the current INMETRO Portarias and ABNT catalogue on each review cycle.

q.en: Which INMETRO ordinance applies to LED luminaires and lamps in Brazil?
q.zh: 哪项INMETRO法令适用于巴西的LED灯具和灯泡？
q.zht: 哪項INMETRO法令適用於巴西的LED燈具和燈泡？

a.en: Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 sets the compulsory conformity assessment requirements for LED lamps and luminaires placed on the Brazilian market, with testing to ABNT NBR IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps) and ABNT NBR IEC 60598 (luminaires). Products must be certified by an accredited certification body (OCP), registered with INMETRO, and carry the INMETRO compliance identification. Energy performance is additionally addressed through the PBE/Selo PROCEL labelling programme administered by INMETRO and Eletrobras.
a.zh: Portaria INMETRO 389/2021为投放巴西市场的LED灯及灯具设定了强制合格评定要求，须按ABNT NBR IEC 62560（自镇流LED灯）及ABNT NBR IEC 60598（灯具）检测。产品须由经认可的认证机构（OCP）认证、在INMETRO注册，并标注INMETRO合规标识。能效另由INMETRO与Eletrobras管理的PBE/Selo PROCEL标签计划处理。
a.zht: Portaria INMETRO 389/2021為投放巴西市場的LED燈及燈具設定了強制合格評定要求，須按ABNT NBR IEC 62560（自鎮流LED燈）及ABNT NBR IEC 60598（燈具）檢測。產品須由經認可的認證機構（OCP）認證、在INMETRO注冊，並標註INMETRO合規標識。能效另由INMETRO與Eletrobras管理的PBE/Selo PROCEL標籤計劃處理。

q.en: Does Chinese CCC certification cover all compliance requirements for LED luminaires in Brazil?
q.zh: 中国CCC认证是否涵盖LED灯具在巴西的所有合规要求？
q.zht: 中國CCC認證是否涵蓋LED燈具在巴西的所有合規要求？

a.en: No. Chinese CCC certification is not recognised in Brazil. INMETRO requires its own compulsory certification through an accredited OCP, INMETRO registration, the 127/220 V 60 Hz grid configuration, PBE/Selo PROCEL energy labelling, and ANATEL homologation for any wireless function. An in-country importer or representative holding a Brazilian CNPJ must also be appointed to act before INMETRO. These are separate obligations not satisfied by CCC.
a.zh: 不。中国CCC认证在巴西不被认可。INMETRO要求通过经认可的OCP进行其自身的强制认证、INMETRO注册、127/220 V 60 Hz电网配置、PBE/Selo PROCEL能效标签，以及任何无线功能的ANATEL型号核准。还须指定持有巴西CNPJ的在地进口商或代表在INMETRO面前代为办理。这些均为CCC未满足的独立义务。
a.zht: 不。中國CCC認證在巴西不被認可。INMETRO要求通過經認可的OCP進行其自身的強制認證、INMETRO注冊、127/220 V 60 Hz電網配置、PBE/Selo PROCEL能效標籤，以及任何無線功能的ANATEL型號核准。還須指定持有巴西CNPJ的在地進口商或代表在INMETRO面前代為辦理。這些均為CCC未滿足的獨立義務。
